title: Outsourcing
summary: 9609 AS — subcontracting operations, benefits, and risks.

simpleExplanation.title: Let specialists do it
simpleExplanation.summary: Outsourcing uses external firms for activities previously done in-house, often to cut cost or access expertise.

sections.content: **Outsourcing** (4.3.2) completes **AS Topic 4**. Balance **cost savings** against **control and quality** in essays.
